narrative: U.S.-Iran peace optimism drives a sharp dollar retreat as mediators hammer out a memorandum of understanding—DXY -0.41% to a 2.5-month low. USD/JPY falls to 156.356 as crude plunges toward $90, unwinding the geopolitical risk premium; gold higher +2.87% near $4,700; equities +1.46%; VIX 17.4. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (1.09% spread) anchors G8 flows on RBNZ hike bets. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
